text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 You've been approved as a Moderator. We're thrilled to have you on the team — please check the moderator handbook and feel free to reach out if you have any questions. Looking forward to working with you!

Welcome aboard, guide_sam! 🎉 You've been approved as an Event Helper. We're excited to have you helping shape our community events — keep an eye out for the events calendar and don't hesitate to ask if you need anything. Great to have you here!

Welcome, mentor_lina! 🎉 You've been approved as a Mentor. We're so glad to have your experience and guidance in the community. Please introduce yourself whenever you're ready — the members are going to love having you around!
